prompt: Ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of a young woman sitting alone in the corner booth of a vintage diner on a rainy night, leaning against a rain-covered window as blurred city lights glow outside. Wet streets reflect red brake lights, white headlights, and cool blue neon, creating dreamy bokeh through raindrops on the glass. She has long, naturally tousled dark hair, minimal makeup, soft expressive eyes, and wears a deep burgundy knit sweater layered beneath an oversized black wool coat. Quiet, melancholic expression with relaxed posture, one shoulder resting against the window, subtle wind-blown strands framing her face. Warm tungsten diner lighting softly illuminates her skin while cool blue city light spills through the rain-covered window, creating cinematic color contrast. Authentic reflections on the glass, natural skin texture with visible pores, soft film grain, shallow depth of field, moody atmosphere, intimate storytelling, Kodak Portra 800 color palette, warm amber and teal tones, 50mm lens, f/1.4, slow shutter with realistic light trails outside while the subject remains perfectly sharp, editorial fashion photography, emotional realism, photorealistic, HDR, 8K, no CGI, no illustration, no text, no watermark.

promptZh: 超写实电影感人像，主角是一位 年轻女性，独自坐在 复古餐厅 的角落卡座中，雨夜里她倚靠在布满雨水的窗边，窗外是模糊的城市灯光。湿漉漉的街道反射着红色的刹车灯、白色的车头灯和冷蓝色的霓虹灯，透过玻璃上的雨滴形成了梦幻般的虚化效果。她留着一头自然凌乱的深色长发，妆容清淡，眼神柔和且富有表现力，身穿 深酒红色针织毛衣，外搭一件超大款黑色羊毛大衣。神情安静忧郁，姿态放松，一侧肩膀靠在窗上，几缕被风吹乱的发丝轻拂脸庞。温暖的钨丝灯光柔和地照亮她的皮肤，而冷蓝色的城市光线透过雨窗洒入，营造出电影般的色彩对比。玻璃上有真实的反射，自然的皮肤纹理可见毛孔，带有柔和的胶片颗粒感，浅景深，情绪化氛围，充满叙事感，Kodak Portra 800 色调，温暖的琥珀色与青色调，50mm 镜头，f/1.4 光圈，慢快门捕捉窗外真实的光轨，同时主体保持绝对清晰，时尚杂志摄影风格，情感写实，照片级真实，HDR，8K，无 CGI，无插画，无文字，无水印。
